name: team dova
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "season_year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "season_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "season_year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "season_type" = 'PRE'), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year" as "year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2024) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", "t41e00b9bde2622961e16bab51896f43c"."team_adjusted_line_yards" AS "team_adjusted_line_yards_0", t19bb7769b37e8f152a7e4ff0e4db8c1c.pass_wr3_dvoa as team_unit_dvoa_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index" as "t41e00b9bde2622961e16bab51896f43c" on "t41e00b9bde2622961e16bab51896f43c"."nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" and "t41e00b9bde2622961e16bab51896f43c"."team_unit" = 'OFFENSE' left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 left join "dvoa_team_unit_seasonlogs_index" as "t19bb7769b37e8f152a7e4ff0e4db8c1c" on "t19bb7769b37e8f152a7e4ff0e4db8c1c"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and "t19bb7769b37e8f152a7e4ff0e4db8c1c"."season_year" = "player_year_teams"."year" and "t19bb7769b37e8f152a7e4ff0e4db8c1c"."team_unit" = 'DEFENSE' group by "current_week_opponents"."opponent", "t41e00b9bde2622961e16bab51896f43c"."team_adjusted_line_yards", t19bb7769b37e8f152a7e4ff0e4db8c1c.pass_wr3_dvoa, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
